'''thonanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wealful|wealful]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wealful|wealful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thonanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thonanithi|thonanithi]] || [[word:thonaniji|thonaniji]] || [[word:thonanishi|thonanishi]] || [[word:thonaniki|thonaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thonanuthuthu|thonanuthuthu]] || [[word:thonanujuju|thonanujuju]] || [[word:thonanushushu|thonanushushu]] || [[word:thonanukuku|thonanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonanuthu|thonanuthu]] || [[word:thonanuju|thonanuju]] || [[word:thonanushu|thonanushu]] || [[word:thonanuku|thonanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonanufthuf|thonanufthuf]] || [[word:thonanufjuf|thonanufjuf]] || [[word:thonanufshuf|thonanufshuf]] || [[word:thonanufkuf|thonanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thonanethe|thonanethe]] || [[word:thonaneje|thonaneje]] || [[word:thonaneshe|thonaneshe]] || [[word:thonaneke|thonaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thonanothotho|thonanothotho]] || [[word:thonanojojo|thonanojojo]] || [[word:thonanoshosho|thonanoshosho]] || [[word:thonanokoko|thonanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonanotho|thonanotho]] || [[word:thonanojo|thonanojo]] || [[word:thonanosho|thonanosho]] || [[word:thonanoko|thonanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonanofthof|thonanofthof]] || [[word:thonanofjof|thonanofjof]] || [[word:thonanofshof|thonanofshof]] || [[word:thonanofkof|thonanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thonanïfthïf|thonanïfthïf]] || [[word:thonanïfjïf|thonanïfjïf]] || [[word:thonanïfshïf|thonanïfshïf]] || [[word:thonanïfkïf|thonanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thonanïfthïfthïf|thonanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thonanïfjïfjïf|thonanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thonanïfshïfshïf|thonanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thonanïfkïfkïf|thonanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonanïfthïf|thonanïfthïf]] || [[word:thonanïfjïf|thonanïfjïf]] || [[word:thonanïfshïf|thonanïfshïf]] || [[word:thonanïfkïf|thonanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonanïfthïf|thonanïfthïf]] || [[word:thonanïfjïf|thonanïfjïf]] || [[word:thonanïfshïf|thonanïfshïf]] || [[word:thonanïfkïf|thonanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thonanæthæ|thonanæthæ]] || [[word:thonanæjæ|thonanæjæ]] || [[word:thonanæshæ|thonanæshæ]] || [[word:thonanækæ|thonanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thonanathatha|thonanathatha]] || [[word:thonanajaja|thonanajaja]] || [[word:thonanashasha|thonanashasha]] || [[word:thonanakaka|thonanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonanatha|thonanatha]] || [[word:thonanaja|thonanaja]] || [[word:thonanasha|thonanasha]] || [[word:thonanaka|thonanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonanafthaf|thonanafthaf]] || [[word:thonanafjaf|thonanafjaf]] || [[word:thonanafshaf|thonanafshaf]] || [[word:thonanafkaf|thonanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thonanasha|thonanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thonanshësha|thonanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thonanrosha|thonanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thonanmusha|thonanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thonanyasha|thonanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothonankshësha|gothonankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothonankrosha|gothonankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothonankmusha|gothonankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothonankyasha|gothonankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thonananasha|thonananasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thonananshësha|thonananshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thonananrosha|thonananrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thonananmusha|thonananmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thonananyasha|thonananyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothonanankshësha|gothonanankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothonanankrosha|gothonanankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothonanankmusha|gothonanankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothonanankyasha|gothonanankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thenænasha|thenænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thenænshësha|thenænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thenænrosha|thenænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thenænmusha|thenænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thenænyasha|thenænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothenænkshësha|gothenænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothenænkrosha|gothenænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothenænkmusha|gothenænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothenænkyasha|gothenænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thonfanasha|thonfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thonfanshësha|thonfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thonfanrosha|thonfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thonfanmusha|thonfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thonfanyasha|thonfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothonfankshësha|gothonfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothonfankrosha|gothonfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothonfankmusha|gothonfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothonfankyasha|gothonfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
